prompt: Tap flop_right to confirm the first board anchor.
why_v1: Board anchors keep your adjustment stable across streets.
feedback_correct_v1: Correct. flop_right is the first board anchor, so the texture read completes the flop pattern before the pressure line moves on.
feedback_incorrect_v1: Incorrect. The right flop card matters because the first flop texture read is part of the baseline you are supposed to repeat consistently.
